plan.title: Exclude upstream-closed issues from triage:queue when cached entries are TTL-fresh

narratives.Description: task triage:queue ranks issues whose cached raw.json still says state=open even after the upstream GitHub issue closed, because cache:fetch-all defaults to state=open and never rewrites a closed entry within its TTL. This story makes the queue defensively skip or refresh stale candidates so a closed issue never surfaces as actionable untriaged work.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
Update the scripts/triage_queue.py load_cached_issues handler so a cached issue whose meta.json fetched_at predates the freshness window is re-resolved against scripts/preflight_cache.py before it enters the ranked queue.
Add a state-refresh path in scripts/_cache_fetch.py and scripts/cache.py so a previously-cached entry absent from the open-only enumeration is revisited and its raw.json rewritten to state=closed.
Add a regression test under tests/ that reproduces the #1322 shape and asserts the queue omits the closed candidate.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft operator, I want triage:queue to drop upstream-closed issues whose cache is stale, so that I never start work the maintainer already finished.

items.title: Given a cached issue with raw.json state=open whose upstream issue is closed and whose cache has not expired, when task triage:queue runs, then the queue excludes that issue from its ranked output.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a cached issue with raw.json state=open whose upstream issue is closed and whose cache has not expired, when task triage:queue runs, then the queue excludes that issue from its ranked output.

items.title: When the cache refresh path runs against a closed-upstream entry, then it rewrites that entry raw.json to state=closed even though the default open-only enumeration no longer returns it.

narrative.Acceptance: When the cache refresh path runs against a closed-upstream entry, then it rewrites that entry raw.json to state=closed even though the default open-only enumeration no longer returns it.

items.title: A regression test fails before the fix and then validates that triage:queue omits the #1322-shaped closed candidate after the fix.

narrative.Acceptance: A regression test fails before the fix and then validates that triage:queue omits the #1322-shaped closed candidate after the fix.

expected_outputs: cache refresh path rewrites closed entries to state=closed

references.title: Issue #1476: bug(triage,cache): closed upstream issues remain in triage:queue when cached open entries are TTL-fresh
